parameters.content:
## Bizbull · Voice Order → GHL
**G0–G2b · Production sync**

**Purpose**
Receive placed-order events → upsert GHL contact → re-arm tags (confirm SMS) → create/move **Voice Orders** opportunity to **Placed**.

**Prod URL**
`POST /webhook/sierra-ghl-sync`

**Auth**
Header Auth on all GHL HTTP nodes:
`Authorization: Bearer <PIT>`

**Docs**
`docs/plan/13-ghl-n8n-order-sync.md` §7.1 / §7.2 / §8

## 1 · INGEST
Receive HTTPS POST.
Path `sierra-ghl-sync` kept for stable URL.
Always respond via **Respond** node.

## 2 · TRANSFORM
Normalize envelope → phone, name, tags[], contact customFields[], upsertBody.
Field IDs: plan §7.1.
Source = **Voice Agent**.

## 3 · GATE
**TRUE** → phone ≥ 7 digits → GHL path.
**FALSE** → skip CRM.
Always HTTP 200 (fail-open).

## 4 · GHL WRITE
1. Upsert contact + last-order fields
2. Remove `order-placed` (SMS re-arm)
3. Add tags → confirm SMS
4. Opp: search Abandoned same session → move to Placed, else create Placed

Pipeline IDs: plan §7.2

## 5 · OUT
JSON summary for caller/logs.
Always **200** so Sierra never blocks on CRM.

## SKIP · No phone
No GHL upsert / SMS / opp.
`{ ok: true, ghl: skipped_no_phone }`

nodes.name: 01 · Receive Order Webhook
nodes.notes: Entry: POST order.placed (and future events). Production: /webhook/sierra-ghl-sync

nodes.name: 02 · Set GHL Location ID
nodes.notes: Bizbull sub-account locationId. includeOtherFields keeps webhook body.

nodes.name: 03 · Normalize Order Payload
nodes.notes: Builds upsertBody + tagsToAdd + hasPhone. Single source of truth for GHL mapping.

nodes.name: 04 · Gate · Has Phone?
nodes.notes: TRUE = GHL path. FALSE = skip (no reliable contact key / no SMS).

nodes.name: 05 · GHL · Upsert Contact + Fields
nodes.notes: Upsert by phone. Sets last_order_* custom fields. Does NOT set tags here.

nodes.name: 06 · GHL · Re-arm SMS (remove order-placed)
nodes.notes: Clears order-placed so GHL 'tag added' workflow can fire again on next add (multi-order / same day).

nodes.name: 07 · GHL · Apply Order Tags
nodes.notes: Appends voice-order, order-placed, pickup|delivery. Triggers confirm SMS workflow.

nodes.name: 08 · Prepare Opportunity
nodes.notes: Builds create/update bodies + pipeline/stage IDs from plan §7.2.

nodes.name: 09 · GHL · Search Abandoned Opp
nodes.notes: Open Abandoned opps for this contact (G3). Match session_id in next node.

nodes.name: 10 · Resolve Opp Action
nodes.notes: If Abandoned opp shares session_id → update to Placed; else create new Placed.

nodes.name: 11 · Gate · Move Existing?
nodes.notes: TRUE = PUT update Abandoned→Placed. FALSE = POST create Placed.

nodes.name: 11b · GHL · Create Opp Placed
nodes.notes: One new opportunity per order at stage Placed.

nodes.name: 04b · Skip · No Phone
nodes.notes: No CRM write. Still HTTP 200 to caller.

nodes.name: 12 · Build Success Response
nodes.notes: Compact JSON for Sierra logs / PowerShell tests (includes opp_id).

nodes.name: 13 · Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Always 200 — CRM must never block the voice path.
